km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Jane於1465年出生在英國。她於1479年與James Madison在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jane于1465年出生在英国。她于1479年与James Madison在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: Jane was born in 1465, in England. She married James Madison in 1479, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Jane est née en 1465, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé James Madison en 1479, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Jane wurde 1465 in England geboren. Sie hat 1479 in England James Madison geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Jane è nata il nel 1465 nel England. Lei sposato James Madison nel 1479, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Janeは1465年にイギリスで生まれた。1479年にイギリスでJames Madisonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane(은)는 1465년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1479년 영국에서 James Madison(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Jane nasceu em 1465, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com James Madison em 1479, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Jane родилась в 1465 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Madison в 1479 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Jane nació en 1465, en Inglaterra. Se casó con James Madison en 1479, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
